title: Lesson Segment
description: One segment of a lesson plan. Produced by the planner, consumed by the Manim template engine and Kokoro TTS. Blueprint §4.3, §5.4.

duration_target_sec.description: Target duration in seconds. Manim will render to roughly this; Kokoro will pace narration accordingly.

narration.description: Max ~40 words per planner system prompt. Sent to Kokoro TTS.

subtitle.description: Short displayable subtitle — not the full narration.

visual.description: Scene-type-specific payload. Must conform to schemas/scene-types/<scene_type>.json.
